meta.title: Matrix of Destiny — Discover your soul's map

hero.desc: The Matrix of Destiny reveals your hidden talents, karmic challenges, and your life's mission — all from your date of birth.

form.lead: Fill in to generate your matrix:
form.socialProof: Used by therapists and numerologists in

about.title: What is the Matrix of Destiny?
about.p1: A self-knowledge system based on numerology and Tarot archetypes. It works as a map of your soul, calculated exclusively from your date of birth.
about.p2: Unlike traditional methods, the Matrix identifies karmic patterns, financial blocks, and the keys to healthier relationships.
about.feature1Desc: Discover what you came to accomplish and how to align your actions with your essence.
about.feature2Desc: Understand your natural talents for prosperity and what blocks your flow of abundance.
about.feature3Desc: Understand your love patterns and attract partnerships that nourish your soul.

how.title: How does it work?
how.step1Desc: Just your name and date of birth.
how.step2Desc: Our algorithm generates your matrix in seconds.
how.step3Desc: Receive the full interpretation of your numbers.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: The calculation uses your day, month, and year of birth. These numbers are reduced and organized into an octogram, where each position corresponds to an area of your life.
faq.q2: Is the Matrix of Destiny a religion?
faq.a2: No. It is a therapeutic tool that combines numerology and archetypes. It can be used by people of any belief.
faq.a3: Yes! We do not store any information. The calculation is generated instantly in your browser.

footer.tagline: Deciphering the numbers of your journey.
